SEARCH
Package it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Server

Class GameServerInstance

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Server.GameServerInstance
public class GameServerInstance extends Object
The GameServerInstance class represents an instance of the game server that manages interactions with multiple clients (handlers) and processes messages related to the game state.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    GameServerInstance()
    Constructs a GameServerInstance initializing the message queue and starting the message processing thread.

    Adds a Player and its associated client ID to the internal mapping.

    Adds a message to the queue.

    Retrieves the client ID associated with a given Player.

    Retrieves the client ID associated with a Player identified by their nickname.

    Retrieves the Player object corresponding to a given nickname.

    Reads messages from the queue and processes them.
    void

    Sends an update message to all clients.

    Sets the GameController instance for this game server instance.
    void

    Sets the handler for a specific client ID.

  • Constructor Details

    • GameServerInstance

      public GameServerInstance()
      Constructs a GameServerInstance initializing the message queue and starting the message processing thread.

  • Method Details

    • readQueue

      public void readQueue()
      Reads messages from the queue and processes them.

    • heartbeat

      public void heartbeat(int clientID)

    • clientDisconnected

      public void clientDisconnected(int clientID)

    • addToQueue

      public void addToQueue(Message message)
      Adds a message to the queue.
      Parameters:
      message - The Message object to add to the queue.

    • sendUpdateToAll

      public void sendUpdateToAll(Message message)
      Sends an update message to all clients.
      Parameters:
      message - The Message object to send to all clients.

    • setGameController

      public void setGameController(GameController gc)
      Sets the GameController instance for this game server instance.
      Parameters:
      gc - The GameController instance to set.

    • setHandler

      public void setHandler(int clientID, Handler handler)
      Sets the handler for a specific client ID.
      Parameters:
      clientID - The client ID associated with the handler.
      handler - The Handler instance to set.

    • getClientID

      public int getClientID(Player player)
      Retrieves the client ID associated with a given Player.
      Parameters:
      player - The Player object whose client ID is to be retrieved.
      Returns:
      The client ID associated with the Player.

    • getPlayer

      public Player getPlayer(String nickname)
      Retrieves the Player object corresponding to a given nickname.
      Parameters:
      nickname - The nickname of the Player to retrieve.
      Returns:
      The Player object corresponding to the nickname, or null if not found.

    • addPlayer

      public void addPlayer(Player player, int clientID)
      Adds a Player and its associated client ID to the internal mapping.
      Parameters:
      player - The Player object to add.
      clientID - The client ID associated with the Player.

    • getClientIDbyNickname

      public int getClientIDbyNickname(String nickname)
      Retrieves the client ID associated with a Player identified by their nickname.
      Parameters:
      nickname - The nickname of the Player whose client ID is to be retrieved.
      Returns:
      The client ID associated with the Player, or -1 if not found.

    • setInGame

      public void setInGame(boolean inGame)
